dead-code-cleanup.notes: Low risk, fast iteration. Always run tests after each removal.

drift-table-declaration-audit.notes: Must regenerate .g.dart files after changes. Be conservative — keep declarations if unsure.
common_deviations: Some DAOs access tables via db.otherDao, not needing direct declaration

flutter-widget-test-fix.notes: When FutureBuilder shows error state, catch the actual exception in test to diagnose. Common issue: wrong datetime format in test data.
